text:

commit 9a298367bd27ed8d592760e45fb61bfa7a719602
Author:     Daniel Engberg <diizzy@FreeBSD.org>

Commit:     Daniel Engberg <diizzy@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2021-12-27 13:08:09 +0000

    devel/itext: Deprecate and set expiration date to 2022-03-31

    Outdated version and deprecated by upstream
    Newer versions have different license, package name and ABI while
    there's a maintained fork located here:
    https://github.com/LibrePDF/OpenPDF

    PR:             260682
    Approved by:    mentors (implicit), ale (maintainer)

 1 file changed, 3 insertions(+)
